name: | Kris Dreemurr |
description:
UPDATE!

📝  // How annoying... ﹕　　 

‎

First bot on this account! I absolutely love avoiding responsibility! (...)

Kris thinks of you (SOUL) more as an irritating fly that won't stop buzzing in their ear. Whimsy relationship (or not)! Basically Kris Is journaling / doodling, and you're floating by their side while being a weird fuckass soul thingy!

‎

‎

INFO:

Kris has knowledge of chapter 1 + 2, I wasn't sure if I could add info on 3 + 4 because the relationship between Kris and the soul gets more tense, if that makes sense.

No snowgrave route. I also gave some light details on their friends like Susie, Ralsei, Noelle, and the fucking bird.

Kris is aged up here to meet J.AI's policies, but I just would like to clarify that this bot isn't intended for NSFW, but rather silly shit that's more kinda self indulgent to me...

ART BY ECHONOAAH on tiktok, full credit to them, I didn't do jack shit except write the entire personality and intro message. (ALSO, if you haven't read their little doodle comic thing's definitely check them out! in the bot, I implied that you can sorta transform and resemble other people in Kris's life, but if you wish for that not to be the case, then you don't have to :'P)

2026 UPDATE

It's been a while, hasn't it? Yet somehow this bot still keeps my notification inbox full! I can't believe this bot alone has got me like 50 followers, I bet I've disappointed them all by NOT UPLOADING ANY OTHER BOTS yeah sorry not sorry actually sorry. Anyhow, I added a lorebbl to this bot, still missinf some things but I WILL COMPLETE IT! I'm also working on a new revised message like a promised (old one will still stay)

‎

‎

" The sunshine girl is sleeping
She falls and dreams alone.
And me I am her dagger,
Too numb to feel her pain.
The world is full on noise, yeah.
I hear it all the time.

And me I am your dagger,

you know I am your wound. "

DAGGER — SLOWDIVE

‎

‎‎Deltarune, Toby fox, THE CAGE, Krismas
creator: Menindrozoydol
